x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Hardware models provide the structured product data Now Assist HAM uses for AI lifecycle analysis, end-of-life detection, and refresh recommendations. Without model coverage, AI cannot identify aging hardware or generate accurate replacement recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No hardware asset records found", finding: "No hardware asset records found. Model coverage cannot be assessed." }; } var gaModel = new GlideAggregate("alm_hardware"); gaModel.addQuery("model", "!=", ""); gaModel.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaModel.query(); var withModel = gaModel.next() ? parseInt(gaModel.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withModel / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of hardware assets have a model (" + withModel + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 90) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of hardware assets are linked to a model. Now Assist HAM has strong structured data for AI lifecycle analysis and refresh planning." }; } else if (pct >= 70) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of hardware assets have a model (target: 90%+). Now Assist HAM AI refresh recommendations will have reduced accuracy." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of hardware assets have a model. Insufficient structured data for meaningful Now Assist HAM AI lifecycle recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Link all hardware assets to a model record. Use the Hardware Asset Workspace normalization tools to identify and map unmodeled assets. Model data is critical for AI lifecycle and refresh analysis.
